scores.rationale: The candidate fits the fictional note product and covers the requested landing-to-capture journey directly.
The landing CTA leads naturally to capture, with consistent mobile and saved-state expectations.
The required states, mobile behavior, failure recovery, and acceptance criteria are concrete enough to implement.
It draws only generic structure from the named reference and explicitly rejects proprietary identifiers and assets.
It specifies keyboard and touch operation, non-color saved feedback, predictable focus, and draft preservation.
Unspecified typography, copy, placement, and error details are correctly treated as assumptions rather than facts.
